data.title: Ecopetrol S.A. obtains authorization to carry out a debt management transaction of up to USD 1.25 billion
data.description: In Bogota, Colombia on April 2, 2026, Ecopetrol S.A. announced its debt management strategy. The company, listed as BVC: ECOPETROL and NYSE: EC, disclosed Resolution No. 0666 on April 1, 2026 as part of the plan.

data.title: Major tech companies support the new x402 Foundation for agentic AI. The x402 protocol will operate under the Linux Foundation.
data.description: Coinbase has announced that the x402 protocol will not be under the ownership of any one entity. The Linux Foundation will act as the neutral and non-profit entity overseeing the agentic AI protocol. This move aims to ensure the protocol's independence and transparency.

data.title: NYSE, DTCC, Tradeweb develop blockchain for 24/7 trading and instant settlement of tokenized securities.
data.description: Several prominent financial institutions such as the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC), and Tradeweb are collaborating to develop blockchain technology for around-the-clock trading and immediate settlement of tokenized securities. The initiative aims to enhance the efficiency and speed of transactions in the industry.

data.title: TECNO Debuts SPARK 50 Series with Two Powerful Models: Next-Level AI Goes Mainstream Alongside a 5G Pioneer and a 7000mAh Endurance King
data.description: TECNO, a global tech brand, has introduced the SPARK 50 and SPARK 50 5G models which cater to the young, tech-savvy generation with their emphasis on durability. These phones come equipped with large batteries, military-grade toughness, and advanced AI features. The launch took place in Hong Kong on April 2, 2026.
